Decades of Cleveland Garage Door Solutions

First Solution Garage Door Services started with a simple mission: provide Cleveland residents with honest, dependable garage door service. We've seen it all, from weather-beaten doors in Tremont to malfunctioning openers in Ohio City.

Our Garage Door Repair Services

Professional garage door repair solutions tailored to your needs.

Garage Door Spring Repair

Expert repair and replacement of broken or worn garage door springs.

Learn More →

Garage Door Opener Repair

Prompt and reliable repair of all major garage door opener brands.

Learn More →

Garage Door Cable Repair

Expert repair and replacement of damaged or frayed garage door cables.

Learn More →

Garage Door Roller Repair

Replacing worn or damaged rollers for smooth, quiet garage door operation.

Learn More →

Garage Door Panel Replacement

Replacing damaged or dented garage door panels to restore your door's appearance and functionality.

Learn More →

Garage Door Weather Seal Replacement

Replacing worn weather seals to improve energy efficiency and protect your garage from the elements.

Learn More →

Frequently Asked Questions

Get answers to the most common questions about our garage door repair services.

How do I know if my garage door spring is broken?

Common signs include a loud bang, a visibly broken spring, or a garage door that is difficult or impossible to open.

Can I replace garage door springs myself?

Due to the high tension involved, it's highly recommended to hire a trained professional to replace garage door springs to avoid serious injury.

How long do garage door springs typically last?

Garage door springs typically last between 7-10 years, depending on usage and maintenance. Regular lubrication can help extend their lifespan.

See what our satisfied customers have to say about their experience.

"My garage door opener stopped working, and I couldn't get my car out! First Solution came to the rescue. They diagnosed the problem quickly and had it fixed in no time. Very happy with their service."

David K. Garage Door Opener Repair

"The cable on my garage door snapped, and I was worried about the door collapsing. First Solution came out and replaced the cable quickly and safely. I felt very confident in their expertise."
